name: PasswordInput
description: An enhanced password input component that extends the base Input with a visibility toggle button. Allows users to show/hide password text with an eye icon toggle.
usage_guidelines: Use for all password input fields.
Inherits all props from the base Input component.
Use onVisibleChange to track visibility state if needed.
Supports ref forwarding for form libraries.

onVisibleChange.description: Callback fired when password visibility changes. Receives true when visible, false when hidden.

ref.description: Ref forwarded to the underlying input element.

...InputProps.description: All standard Input component props are supported (value, onChange, placeholder, disabled, invalid, size, etc.).

styling_info.visual_description: Standard input field with an eye/eye-slash icon button on the right side. The icon toggles between visible (eye) and hidden (eye-slash) states. Uses the LiEye and LiEyeSlash icons from the icon library.

Do: Use for password and sensitive data fields
Use in login and registration forms
Use onVisibleChange for analytics or security logging
Dont: Don't use for non-sensitive text input
Don't forget to add proper labels

Example.title: Example
